sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n16509" key="a)steropo/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀστεροπός</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">όν</itype>, <sense id="n16509.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">=</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">ἀστερωπός, Ζεύς</ref> </xr> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0309.tlg001:2:3" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Achae.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.3</biblScope> </bibl> (anap.).</sense> </entryFree>
